feed.title: SAP Community - Governance, Risk, Compliance (GRC), and Cybersecurity
feed.subtitle: Governance, Risk, Compliance (GRC), and Cybersecurity Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP reports for deleting Inactive users
entry.content:
Hi All,

I'm keen to know if there is a report in SAP which we can schedule to delete inactive users ( User who have never logged in) in SAP? If there is a way to achieve this through SAP GRC?

Thanks in advance!

Regards,

Nandita

entry.title: Is it a good decision for someone without an IT background to learn SAP Security GRC?
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have 5.3 years of experience working in an MNC in a non-IT role (BPO), and I am now looking to shift my career towards IT, specifically in SAP Security GRC, for better growth opportunities. I am not interested in programming languages, and have found limited opportunities in my current field.

I would greatly appreciate insights from individuals who have transitioned into SAP Security GRC from non-IT backgrounds or from those currently working in this domain. Is it a good decision to pursue SAP Security GRC for long-term career growth?

Additionally, I would like to know:

1. What is the average salary package for someone with 3 to 3.5 years of experience in SAP Security GRC?
    Are there any current job openings for candidates with this level of experience? What is the demand for            SAP Security GRC professionals in the market?
2. Are there opportunities for freshers in this field?
3. Could you recommend any reputable training institutes in Hyderabad for SAP Security GRC with contacts?
4. Is certification required after completing the course, and if so, what is the cost?
5. Is any programming knowledge (like Java, Python, etc.) required to learn SAP Security GRC? Is it a "no            coding" field?
6. Is certification necessary to get job calls and Interviews? If so, what is the certification fee?

Looking forward to your valuable feedback.

Regards,
Sridhar.

entry.title: Excluding a Business Role from UAR Data Generation
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We use GRC Business Roles for access provisioning with single / derived roles grouped in these business roles. We run the UAR on the business roles as these are assigned to users, and the UAR config is such that the Business Role owner is the approver. 

We have a requirement to exclude one specific role from the review (this is a Business Role that assigned to all the users and we do not want to review that). In the UAR data generation job, we tried to filter out this role by using 'Role Name - is not' criteria. But the UAR data is still generated for this role. I also tried the program 'GRAC_UAR_REQUEST_GEN' and excluded the Business Role, but no luck. 

Any idea how we can exclude one or more Business Roles from the UAR data generation, apart from adding the rest of the roles in the 'Role Name is' filter?

Thanks in advance.

Hari

#Governance, Risk, Compliance (GRC), and Cybersecurity

entry.title: S/4 HANA License check for specified products
entry.content:
Hi Experts

SAP S/4 HANA provides for a basic framework to check for legal control and license checks. A functionality is provided to indicate if the license type is checked based on Products or is based on a control class.

We have a requirement where only specific products are subject to a license check. All other products do not require a license check should not be subject to a license check in the sales order.

If we define a license type which is based on products / control class, the items that are relevant for a license check would be managed via the license type relevant for these parameters.

However, since all other products are not subject to a license requirement, there is a need that such materials are not subject to a license requirement for the legal control activated for the country. 

How do we achieve this exclusion so that products that are not required for a license check are not expected to be maintained in a different license type ? Maintaining a wider list of products that are not subject to a license check would be a huge maintenance issue.

Would appreciate inputs from experts in the forum. 

Regards

Rohit Zalani

entry.title: Examples for Technical and Functional upgrade in GRC
entry.content: Please provide some Instances or scenarios for Technical and Functional upgrade in GRC

entry.title: Can an SAP GRC S/4HANA system communicate with a non-Unicode SAP system?
entry.content:
Can an SAP GRC S/4HANA system communicate with a non-Unicode SAP system?

Or must the non-Unicode SAP system be converted to Unicode first?

entry.title: Enabling Auto Provisioning GRC AC Workflow
entry.content:
Hello,

I have 3 default roles all users should get, and they should not require approval to be provisioned. I would like to enable auto provisioning for roles without role owners, but then that opens up a risk of roles being assigned that are outside of our design (SAP standard delivered roles, etc). that have no role owner.

Is there any setup up where I can avoid this and still accomplish what I am looking to do.

entry.title: How will GRC-Focused Consultancies adapt to the New SAP Partner Points System for Gold logo?
entry.content:
With the recent changes to the SAP Partner Points system, consultancies focused on Governance, Risk, and Compliance (GRC) modules (e.g., AC, PC, RM, AM) are facing a significant challenge. The new framework no longer includes certifications related to GRC, and the points are now solely awarded for expertise in functional modules (BackOffice).

This leaves many GRC-specialized consultancies, like the one I work with, in a difficult position. It’s unclear how a consultancy focused exclusively on GRC can accumulate enough points to maintain its Gold Partner status under this new model. Does anyone have insights into how consultancies in this niche can navigate these changes? Are there plans from SAP to introduce GRC-related certifications or new ways for GRC-focused firms to earn the necessary points?

entry.title: Is there a project plan for integrating Solution Manager ITSM with GRC?
entry.content:
It has been many years (maybe decades) since I was asked to do this and much of my documentation has been destroyed.

Does anyone have a project plan to integrate Solution Manager 7.2 with GRC 12.0?

I'll keep looking in what's left of my own, and elsewhere online, but appreciate any help.

Thank you.

entry.title: SAP GTS QUESTION
entry.content: I have created 100 sales orders in feeder system, but only 90 sales orders transferred to SAP GTS data are same like customer and material. What could be the reason?

entry.title: SoD without GRC Tool
entry.content:
Hi!

My question is a bit complex, is it possible for a company to create SoD risks without GRC tool?

I have an idea of how to have this, but I need help with ideas to automate this process and one north for starting this.

What comes to mind is to get a list of transactions that the functional/business area considers critical and define what cannot be with a single user, my point is how do I consolidate this by centralizing it in one place so that I can do simulations, for example of new access to a user and be able to identify if this can be assigned.

I know it sounds like an difficulty thing to do, but I want to at least try to have better risk control and be able to make improvements until the company acquires a GRC tool that does this type of work in an automated way.

entry.title: how to I prepared the sap GRC Risk management Report?
Sales Order block for dangerous materials
entry.content:
Hello, 

My client's business include some dangerous materials and need to apply 2 level controls on sales orders: 

1. First control level : blocking sales order if the ship-to-party is out of validity according to a license at the sales order date.

2. Second control level: information pop-up at sales order when quantity or weight limit is reached for a group of materials by:

 2.1. One sales order/Delivery

2.2. Sales order during a define period

My question is: which SAP business process could handle this process? Can it handle full process or at least first control level

entry.title: How to assign role validity dates different from user access dates (WS USER_ACCESS_REQUEST)
entry.content:
HELLO,

it's my first question, enjoy

We have an Identity Management application wich call webservice USER_ACCESS_REQUEST on SAP GRC system, to create/modify users in a S/4HANA productive system, with ARQ and BRM GRC' modules.

Is it possible to manage different validity date scenarios for user access and role validation ?

apparently the sap standard only calculates dates for roles; if roles have a time limit, then validity dates at account level will be adjusted, 
validfrom and validto dates are not taken into account in the userinfo parameter group.

For example, how do you manage access for a student or trainee who is only present for a month in the future? e.g. between September and December 2025?

with other value or other parameter ? now with ReqType (002) and ProvAction (006)

thanks a lot for your support !

David

entry.title: maintenance planner adds packages which not show dependant in SPAM
entry.content:
Dear Team, 

we are planning to update GRC system  to SP28 of grc components, we see sap note below requesting to update add-ons on dependent systems as well (S4hana, CAR, BW, Solman).

1352498 - Support Pack Numbering - GRC Access Control

when we see from spam we can update for dependent systems eg: S4hana only grc component update is possible (no update to other components like abap , basis gw, UI5). yet, when we generate stack from maintenance planner, we see many components getting update which will need more testing and remediation.

kindly suggest if we can update grc addon alone on remote systems and do SP update on GRC system.

entry.title: NWBC --> Access Management --> Access Request Administration --> Search Request
entry.content:
From which tables the data is fetching to Search Request screen, the status of the search request, in which stage the request is pending and who is the approver for that stage?

Is there any table to know the details of the status of the pending request, which stage the request is pending and who is the approver for that stage, can we find with the help of Access Request Number.

thank you

 ITGC Chandra

entry.title: Access Control - Assessment of users, roles and their restrictions
entry.content:
Hello there!

Seeking your insights and suggestions please. Currently our client who has 2 businesses, 1 will be sold for the next 3 months temporarily, SAP architecture will be the same. What would be the requirements, restrictions, compliance to ensure that the sold business cannot access the other. In terms of the organizational level, all of the areas are restricted except for the business area, will this cause of risks? or can we stay it the same?

entry.title: SAP SuccessFactors SoD Matrix for SAP GRC
entry.content:
Hello,

We are connection SAP SuccessFactors with SAP GRC Access Control to analyses the possible SoD conflicts.

Actually, SAP doesn't provide any standard Matrix or example on how to create it. Since it doesn't follow the permissions/accesses style of an ERP, does anyone have any matrix or examples of how permissions should be included in the tool?

Thanks in advanced,

Regards.

entry.title: Segragation of roles based on Organizational values
entry.content:
Hello!

How do you analyze/ check on the organizational values/ levels if the two businesses of the client are segragated? Any insights/comments will be much appreciated.

Thank you.

entry.title: WAPD GRC_PC_ISSUM is inactive
